task_description: find all files with non-ASCII characters in their names
code: find . -type f | while read file; do if [[ "$file" =~ [^\x00-\x7F] ]]; then echo "$file"; fi; done

return code: 2

```sh
find . -type f | tr -d '\n' | xargs -I {} sh -c 'if [ "$(echo {} | iconv -f UTF-8 -t ASCII//TRANSLIT//IGNORE)" != "{}" ]; then echo {}; fi'
```
